content.json:
# 🧹 Azure Sandbox Resource Cleanup Dashboard

Real-time visibility into sandbox resource groups, age, cost, and cleanup status.

content.query:
resourcecontainers
| where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups'
| where subscriptionId !in ('79c55d71-21c7-42c2-958c-0f8f744cfee3')
| extend CreatedOn = todatetime(tags['CreatedDate'])
| where isnotempty(CreatedOn)
| extend AgeDays = datetime_diff('day', now(), CreatedOn)
| summarize TotalRGs = count(), DeletionCandidates = countif(AgeDays >= 15), WarningRGs = countif(AgeDays >= 10 and AgeDays < 15), SafeRGs = countif(AgeDays < 10)
content.title: Resource Group Status

content.query:
resourcecontainers
| where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups'
| where subscriptionId !in ('79c55d71-21c7-42c2-958c-0f8f744cfee3')
| extend CreatedOn = todatetime(tags['CreatedDate'])
| where isnotempty(CreatedOn)
| extend AgeDays = datetime_diff('day', now(), CreatedOn)
| summarize TotalRGs = count(), DeletionCandidates = countif(AgeDays >= 15), Warnings = countif(AgeDays >= 10 and AgeDays < 15), Safe = countif(AgeDays < 10) by subscriptionId
| join kind=inner (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project subscriptionId, SubscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project SubscriptionName, TotalRGs, DeletionCandidates, Warnings, Safe
| order by DeletionCandidates desc
content.title: By Subscription

content.query:
resourcecontainers
| where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups'
| where subscriptionId !in ('79c55d71-21c7-42c2-958c-0f8f744cfee3')
| extend CreatedOn = todatetime(tags['CreatedDate']), Creator = tostring(tags['Creator'])
| where isnotempty(CreatedOn)
| extend AgeDays = datetime_diff('day', now(), CreatedOn)
| where AgeDays >= 15
| join kind=inner (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project subscriptionId, SubscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project ResourceGroup = name, Creator, AgeDays, CreatedOn = format_datetime(CreatedOn, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), SubscriptionName
| order by AgeDays desc
content.title: Deletion Candidates

content.query:
resourcecontainers
| where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups'
| where subscriptionId !in ('79c55d71-21c7-42c2-958c-0f8f744cfee3')
| extend CreatedOn = todatetime(tags['CreatedDate']), Creator = tostring(tags['Creator'])
| where isnotempty(CreatedOn)
| extend AgeDays = datetime_diff('day', now(), CreatedOn)
| where AgeDays >= 10 and AgeDays < 15
| join kind=inner (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project subscriptionId, SubscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project ResourceGroup = name, Creator, AgeDays, DaysUntilDeletion = 15 - AgeDays, SubscriptionName
| order by AgeDays desc
content.title: Warning - Pending Deletion

content.query:
resourcecontainers
| where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups'
| where subscriptionId !in ('79c55d71-21c7-42c2-958c-0f8f744cfee3')
| extend CreatedOn = todatetime(tags['CreatedDate']), Creator = tostring(tags['Creator'])
| where isnotempty(CreatedOn)
| extend AgeDays = datetime_diff('day', now(), CreatedOn)
| where AgeDays >= 15
| summarize TotalRGs = count(), OldestDays = max(AgeDays) by Creator
| order by TotalRGs desc
content.title: Deletion Candidates by Creator

content.query:
resourcecontainers
| where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups'
| where subscriptionId !in ('79c55d71-21c7-42c2-958c-0f8f744cfee3')
| extend CreatedOn = todatetime(tags['CreatedDate']), Creator = tostring(tags['Creator'])
| where isnotempty(CreatedOn)
| extend AgeDays = datetime_diff('day', now(), CreatedOn)
| where AgeDays >= 15
| summarize Count = count() by Creator
| order by Count desc
| take 10
content.title: Top 10 Creators

content.query:
resourcecontainers
| where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups'
| where subscriptionId !in ('79c55d71-21c7-42c2-958c-0f8f744cfee3')
| extend CreatedOn = todatetime(tags['CreatedDate'])
| where isnotempty(CreatedOn)
| extend AgeDays = datetime_diff('day', now(), CreatedOn)
| summarize Count = count() by bin(AgeDays, 7)
| order by AgeDays asc
content.title: Age Distribution (Weekly)

content.json:
---

💡 **Note:** Cost data requires Cost Management API which cannot be queried directly in Workbooks. Cost data is available in the Logic App email reports.
